sections.label: Conventions
sections.placeholder:
- Server Components by default
- Immutable data patterns
- Co-locate tests with source

sections.label: Project Structure
sections.placeholder:
src/app/ — App Router pages
src/components/ — Shared components
src/lib/ — Utilities

sections.label: Custom Rules
sections.placeholder:
Always use TypeScript strict mode
Prefer named exports
No default exports except pages

values.conventions:
- App Router with Server Components by default
- Immutable data patterns (spread, not mutation)
- Co-locate tests with source files
- Use server actions for mutations
values.structure:
src/app/ — App Router pages and layouts
src/components/ — Shared UI components
src/lib/ — Utilities and helpers
src/types/ — TypeScript type definitions
values.customRules:
Prefer named exports over default exports (except page.tsx)
Use Tailwind CSS classes, avoid inline styles
Keep components under 200 lines

values.techStack: Python 3.12, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2.0, Pydantic v2, Alembic
values.conventions:
- Type hints on all functions
- Dependency injection via FastAPI Depends
- Async endpoints for I/O operations
- Pydantic models for request/response validation
values.structure:
app/ — Application root
app/api/ — Route handlers
app/models/ — SQLAlchemy models
app/schemas/ — Pydantic schemas
app/services/ — Business logic
tests/ — Test files
values.customRules:
Use async/await for all database operations
Keep route handlers thin, delegate to services
Alembic for all schema migrations

values.techStack: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, React Router
values.conventions:
- Functional components only
- Custom hooks for shared logic
- React Query for server state
- Zustand for client state
values.structure:
src/components/ — UI components
src/hooks/ — Custom hooks
src/pages/ — Route pages
src/api/ — API client functions
src/stores/ — State management
values.customRules:
No class components
Prefer composition over prop drilling
Use lazy loading for route-level code splitting
